full_content: Deliberation Archive record DELIB-0877 version 5: owner added the requirement that programmatic control-plane mode/projection operations maintain awareness of multiple harnesses and both sides of the Prime Builder/Loyal Opposition bridge. The updated planning record requires a harness topology registry, bridge role slots, target harness/project-root/role/subject fields, and tests for single-harness, dual-harness, missing-counterpart, stale-session, and conflicting future-mode scenarios.
explicit_change_request: Owner observed that the programmatic control-plane approach requires GT-KB to maintain awareness of multiple harnesses, because switching or setting operating mode requires knowledge of both sides of the Loyal Opposition/Prime Builder bridge.
change_reason: Update the GT-KB/application isolation phased planning record to require harness topology awareness and bridge role-slot handling for control-plane mode/projection operations.
